faqs.question: What payment methods do you support?
faqs.answer: We support credit/debit cards, ACH bank transfers, digital wallets (Apple Pay, Google Pay), and wire transfers.

faqs.question: What is the maximum transaction amount?
faqs.answer: Standard accounts: $50,000. Verified business: up to $500,000. Enterprise: custom limits.

faqs.question: How long do transfers take?
faqs.answer: Standard ACH: 1-3 business days. Instant: minutes. Wire: same day if before 4 PM EST.

faqs.question: Do you support international payments?
faqs.answer: Yes! 45+ currencies across 180+ countries with competitive exchange rates.

faqs.question: How do you protect my financial data?
faqs.answer: 256-bit encryption, multi-factor authentication, real-time fraud monitoring. PCI DSS Level 1 and SOC2 Type II certified.

faqs.question: What is two-factor authentication?
faqs.answer: 2FA adds extra security. After your passphrase, verify via SMS, authenticator app, or biometric scan.

faqs.question: What if I suspect unauthorized activity?
faqs.answer: Immediately contact our fraud team at 1-800-PAYFLOW or use 'Report Issue' in app.

faqs.question: Is my money insured?
faqs.answer: Funds are FDIC insured up to $250,000 through our banking partners.

faqs.question: How do I open a PayFlow account?
faqs.answer: Download our app or visit payflow.com. Complete identity verification in minutes.

faqs.question: What account types are available?
faqs.answer: Personal (free), Premium ($9.99/mo), Business ($29.99/mo), Enterprise (custom).

faqs.question: How do I verify my identity?
faqs.answer: Upload government ID and provide SSN last 4 digits. Most verified instantly.

faqs.question: How do I close my account?
faqs.answer: Transfer out funds, then Settings > Account > Close Account.

faqs.question: What are your fees?
faqs.answer: Personal: Free ACH, 1.5% instant. Business: 2.9% + $0.30 per card. Premium: reduced fees.

faqs.question: Are there any hidden fees?
faqs.answer: No hidden fees. All charges displayed before confirmation. Free: maintenance, declined transactions, support.

faqs.question: How do I reduce transaction fees?
faqs.answer: Upgrade to Premium for lower fees. Business accounts get volume discounts.

faqs.question: How do I send money?
faqs.answer: Tap 'Send', enter recipient's email/phone, enter amount, confirm.

faqs.question: How do I receive money?
faqs.answer: Share your PayFlow username, email, or phone. Money arrives instantly.

faqs.question: Can I cancel a transfer?
faqs.answer: Instant transfers cannot be cancelled. Pending ACH can be cancelled within 30 minutes.

faqs.question: How do I integrate PayFlow with my business?
faqs.answer: Access our REST API at docs.payflow.com. SDKs for Python, Node.js, Ruby, PHP, Java.

faqs.question: What are the API rate limits?
faqs.answer: Standard: 100/min. Business: 1,000/min. Enterprise: 10,000/min.

faqs.question: How do webhooks work?
faqs.answer: Configure endpoints in dashboard. POST requests for events like payment.completed.

faqs.question: How do I dispute a transaction?
faqs.answer: Transaction History > select > 'Dispute'. Provide reason and documents. 10 business days resolution.

faqs.question: What if someone disputes a payment I received?
faqs.answer: You'll get notification. Respond within 7 days with evidence.

faqs.question: How do I set up recurring payments?
faqs.answer: Dashboard > Subscriptions > Create Plan. Set amount, frequency, billing date.

faqs.question: How do I contact support?
faqs.answer: Chat: 24/7 in app. Phone: 1-800-PAYFLOW (6 AM - 10 PM EST). Email: support@payflow.com.

faqs.question: Are you compliant with financial regulations?
faqs.answer: Yes. FinCEN registered, PCI DSS Level 1, SOC2 Type II, GDPR compliant.
